flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oral Roberts University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $35.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oral Roberts University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $35.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oral Roberts University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
